current.summary: TUI v3 Phase 3 COMPLETE. Hook/MCP naming feature 2 of 5 tasks done, 3 remaining (TUI modal, import prompting, registry validation).

activeWork.description: Hook/MCP Naming Feature — making hooks and MCP servers user-nameable across CLI and TUI
activeWork.progress: Scanner enhanced with DisplayName heuristics (script filenames, event+matcher). CLI `syllago rename` command shipped. TUI text input modal, import --name flag, and registry validation remaining.

git.lastCommit: cad6ff4 docs: update tui-builder skill with Phase 3 patterns and decisions

recentDecisions: Library view = full-width table with columns Name/Type/Scope/Files/Installed/Description
Enter on table row → drill-in with file tree + preview pane (file tree supports expand/collapse)
Tab = sub-tab cycling (higher-level), h/l = pane focus switching (spatial) — swapped from original
Minimum terminal width 80 (was 60) — Content group needs space for 6 tabs + buttons
Help bar wraps to 2 lines at narrow widths instead of dropping hints
Middle dot (·) separator in help bar, not asterisk
borderedPanel() with MaxWidth+MaxHeight — never use raw lipgloss Width/Height for panels
Hooks/MCP require names: prompt at import, require in registries, rename CLI command
TUI rename via basic text input modal (keyboard+mouse), reusable for future prompts
Tools column removed from table — will surface in metadata pane (Phase 4)
Search (/) in Library table: filters by name/description/type, app bypasses shortcuts during input
Sort (s/S) cycles columns with ▲/▼ header indicator
nextSteps: 1. BUILD TUI text input modal (modal.go): centered overlay, text field, Cancel/Save buttons, MUST have keyboard AND mouse support. First modal component — will be reused.
2. WIRE [r] Rename button in topbar or as context action: opens modal for selected item, saves to .syllago.yaml, refreshes table/list.
3. BUILD --name flag on `syllago add` for hooks/MCP: interactive prompt when adding content without a name.
4. BUILD registry validation: warn on unnamed hooks/MCP during `syllago validate` or registry sync.
5. AFTER NAMING FEATURE: Continue Phase 4 (metadata bar) and Phase 5 (file tree split for Content > Skills/Hooks tabs).
6. UPDATE docs/design/tui-adaptive-zones.md: Library section needs update — design doc still describes gallery grid but we built a table instead.
7. UPDATE cli/internal/tui/CLAUDE.md: add documentation for new components (table, filetree, library, explorer).

context.notes: Phase 3 was significantly expanded beyond the original spec — added Library table view, file tree, search/sort, naming feature. The original Phase 3 spec only called for explorer+items+preview. Design doc (tui-adaptive-zones.md) still describes Gallery Grid for Library which was replaced with a table. tui-builder SKILL.md has been updated with all Phase 3 patterns. 49 tests passing, all green.
context.tuiFiles: app.go, explorer.go, library.go, table.go, filetree.go, items.go, preview.go, topbar.go, helpbar.go, styles.go, keys.go

previousSessions.summary: Brief session — paused to clarify file tree expansion UI. Resolved: file tree supports expand/collapse.
TUI v3 Phase 1+2 complete. Shell, styles, test infrastructure, two-tier tab navigation.
TUI v3 research session: deep research into 10+ Go TUI projects.
